CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Continued To May-01-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. CHRIS HOUSH, Esq. of Housh Tax Law, A.P.C. (tel: 510-593-9069) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. DOUGLAS BETETA, Esq. of The Office of the Attorney General of California (tel: 213-269-6014) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order sustaining the demurrer without leave to amend (see signed order for complete ruling). (302/RBU)*****

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. CHRIS HOUSH, Esq. and Provisionally Licensed Lawyer KRISTY AVILLA, Esq. of Housh Tax Law, A.P.C. (Tel: 510-593-9069) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. DOUGLAS BETETA, Esq. of Office of the Attorney General of California (Tel: 213-269-6014) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court orders the parties to provide supplemental briefs no longer than 5 pages to be filed simultaneously by March 1, 2024. The Court continues the matter to March 11, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
